hero.title: Manage Your Pokémon Card Collection
hero.description: Track, organize, and showcase your Pokémon TCG collection with our powerful management tools.

features.title: Everything You Need for Your Collection
features.description: PokéCollector provides you with all the tools you need to manage your Pokémon card collection.

card_search.title: Card Search
card_search.description: Search and filter through thousands of Pokémon cards by set, type, rarity, and more.

collection_management.title: Collection Management
collection_management.description: Add cards to your collection, track quantities, and organize them however you prefer.

wishlist.title: Wishlist
wishlist.description: Keep track of cards you want to acquire with our wishlist feature.

custom_collections.title: Custom Collections
custom_collections.description: Create and manage multiple custom collections for different sets or themes.

advanced_filtering.title: Advanced Filtering
advanced_filtering.description: Filter your collection by set, type, rarity, and more to find exactly what you're looking for.

realtime_updates.title: Real-time Updates
realtime_updates.description: Your collection syncs across all your devices with real-time updates.

cta.title: Ready to Start Your Collection?
cta.description: Join thousands of Pokémon card collectors who are already using PokéCollector to manage their collections.
